source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open BatBucks, the stock-trading app at http://localhost:3002 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Place a LIMIT BUY order for 2 shares of Apple (AAPL) with a limit price of $188.88, time-in-force good-til-canceled (GTC), then review and submit the order.
